notes: Vela (v1.0 developer build) | True multitasking — cooperative foreground apps run alongside background services
features: DEVELOPER BUILD — the v0.9.5 multitasking foundation generalized toward v1.0
Background services run while you keep using the prompt (httpd start --bg / status / stop; service)
Cooperative app framework (appkit) — a foreground app yields so it runs alongside background services
Background scheduled tasks fire while idle (task background on) and an experimental asyncio shell (asyncmode on)
Standard synchronous shell retained as the recovery / crash fallback
